nasb.text: But Abner the son of Ner, commander of Saul’s army, had taken Ish-bosheth the son of Saul and brought him over to Mahanaim.

esv.text: But Abner the son of Ner, commander of Saul’s army, took Ish-bosheth the son of Saul and brought him over to Mahanaim,

cnv.text: 當時，掃羅的元帥尼珥的兒子押尼珥已經領著掃羅的兒子伊施波設，把他帶過河到瑪哈念去，

ccb.text: 那时，扫罗的元帅尼珥的儿子押尼珥带着扫罗的儿子伊施波设过河来到玛哈念，
